Created attachment 229819
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2

--- epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.42/NEWS	2021-09-02 09:21:45.000000000 +0000
+++ epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.44/NEWS	2021-11-12 05:26:16.000000000 +0000
@@ -1,6 +1,21 @@

 epson-inkjet-printer-escpr2-1.1.42                        (2021-09-02)
 ----------------------------------------------------------------------
  * Supported new models

New PPD files for the following models have been added.
EW-M634T_Series
EW-M674FT_Series
EW-M754T_Series
WF-C879RBAM

Missing USE_LDCONFIG has been added. (Warning in portlint)

The building by poudriere testport -k was successful.
